---
title: 👍 a11y Resources
---
Accessibility (often abbreviated to A11y — as in, "a", then 11
characters, and then "y") in web development means enabling as many
people as possible to use websites, even when those people's abilities
are limited in some way.

<small>(Taken from: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Accessibility)</small>

- <a target="_blank" href="https://a11y-style-guide.com/style-guide/" ADD_DATE="1646700633" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">A11Y Style Guide</a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://color.a11y.com/" ADD_DATE="1646700474" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Color Contrast Accessibility Validator</a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://www.a11yproject.com/checklist/" ADD_DATE="1646700441" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Checklist - The A11Y Project</a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG21/quickref/?showtechniques=121" ADD_DATE="1648127014" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">How to Meet WCAG (Quickref Reference)</a>
